title: Brand
intro:
What is Personal Branding Photography?

Personal branding photography is more than a traditional headshot session. It is a custom photo experience designed to capture the personality, story, and visual identity behind you and your business.
body:
These sessions are created for entrepreneurs, creatives, and business owners who want imagery that feels true to who they are and what they do. Along with professional portraits, personal branding photography can include you in your workspace, behind the scenes of your process, interacting with your tools or products, and the details that make your brand feel distinct.

The goal is to create a collection of images you can use across your website, social media, marketing materials, press features, and anywhere your brand shows up online or in print. Instead of relying on generic stock photos or a single headshot, you'll have a cohesive library of photographs that helps your audience connect with you and your work.

Personal branding photography is ideal for anyone who wants their visuals to feel polished, intentional, and aligned with their business.

Brand Package options with Sgoodie Photography:

1. The Headshot Session

For professionals who need a clean, confident, updated portrait.

Includes:

up to 30 minutes
1 look
2 retouched images
private online gallery
option to purchase more

2. The Branding Session

For business owners who need more than a headshot — images that tell the story of their work, personality, and brand.

Includes:

planning consultation
up to 2 hours
2–3 looks
portraits, candid work images, details, and business environment
20 edited images
private online gallery
